description.zh-CN:
AI Agent 创建和管理平台，通过自然语言对话构建智能助手。
选择您偏好的语言和主题，开始探索。
description.en-US:
A platform for creating and managing AI Agents through natural language.
Select your preferred language and theme to get started.

description.zh-CN: 通过自然语言对话，构建和管理 AI 助手。每个助手拥有独立的知识、工具和沙箱环境，帮助您完成各种任务。
description.en-US: Build and manage AI assistants through natural language. Each assistant has its own knowledge, tools, and sandbox environment to help you accomplish various tasks.

description.zh-CN: 浏览丰富的预构建 AI 专家，涵盖编程、设计、写作、数据分析等领域。一键添加到您的工作区，立即开始对话。
description.en-US: Browse a rich collection of pre-built AI experts across coding, design, writing, data analysis, and more. Add them to your workspace with one click.

description.zh-CN: 完成几项基础配置，即可充分发挥 Yao Agents 的能力。您也可以跳过配置，直接开始体验。
description.en-US: Complete a few basic configurations to unlock the full power of Yao Agents. You can also skip setup and start exploring right away.
